description:

Name: Cocaine Bear
Also Known As: Pablo Escobear, Cokey the Bear

Origin: Cocaine Bear (2023), loosely inspired by true events

Classification: Drug-Influenced Predator / Apex Mammal

Appearance:
A massive American black bear with thick, dark fur matted in places from its chaotic rampages through the forest. Its muzzle is often smeared with white residue, and its bloodshot eyes carry a crazed, hyperactive energy. Though it retains a mostly natural appearance, its erratic movements and unpredictable aggression reveal something deeply wrong—an animal pushed far beyond its natural limits.
creator: Ryzenku
